name: Chocolate Marshmallow Nut Squares
recipeInstructions:
Use gluten-free ingredients for someone on a celiac diet.
Spray a 9-inch square cake pan with non-stick vegetable spray, or line the pan with waxed paper.
Melt chocolate chips and peanut butter in a large saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth. Alternatively, microwave at medium power for about 2 1/2 minutes until the mixture can be stirred smooth. Stir in corn syrup. Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes.
In a food processor, puree the beans and cinnamon. Stir into the chocolate mixture until well blended. Stir in marshmallows and nuts until coated. If mini marshmallows are not available, cut large marshmallows with wet scissors.
Press evenly into the prepared pan. Chill for about 45 minutes or until firm. Cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours or up to 6 days before serving. Cut into 24 squares.
